prompt: Transform the subject into a high-end magazine cover portrait while preserving 100% facial identity, facial structure, skin tone, proportions, and all unique facial features. Do not alter eyes, nose, mouth, jawline, or facial shape. Maintain realistic skin texture, pores, and natural imperfections. Style the image like a luxury international magazine cover photoshoot, with cinematic studio lighting, premium fashion photography composition, and ultra-clean editorial aesthetics. The subject should appear confident, elegant, and professionally photographed, wearing stylish modern clothing that matches a sophisticated luxury aesthetic. Use soft directional lighting with subtle shadows and depth, creating a polished studio look similar to Vogue, GQ, Forbes, or Harper’s Bazaar covers. Background should be minimal, elegant, and slightly textured or gradient-based, matching the color palette of the outfit and overall mood. Add authentic magazine cover elements: realistic masthead typography, elegant headlines and feature text, issue number, barcode, and small editorial details, clean layout with professional spacing. Keep all typography subtle and realistic, integrated naturally into the composition. Depth of field should keep the subject in sharp focus while maintaining a premium cinematic atmosphere. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, editorial photography, luxury magazine aesthetic, highly polished, cinematic, 8K quality.
